subject: PhD positions at ARC Centre for Cryo-EM of Membrane Proteins,              Australia
body:
G’day CCPEM community,

 

Below is information about an opportunity for joining our new ARC Centre for Cryo-electron Microscopy of Membrane Proteins as a PhD student.

 

There are several nodes involved, and ours is in the beautiful Wollongong <https://www.google.com/search?q=wollongong&source=lnms&tbm=isch&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiSxOyOmt_yAhXaxjgGHa_ADAEQ_AUoA3oECAEQBQ&biw=1766&bih=1243> .

 

There is a Centre Information Night - held virtually on 28th of September (Sydney/Melbourne time).

 

Come and join us!

 

 <https://scholars.uow.edu.au/display/gokhan_tolun> Gökhan Tolun, M.S., Ph.D.

Senior Lecturer

 <https://www.uow.edu.au/science-medicine-health/schools-entities/school-of-chemistry-and-molecular-bioscience/> School of Chemistry and Molecular Bioscience |  <https://smah.uow.edu.au/index.html> Faculty of Science, Medicine and Health (SMAH) | Room 111 / Building 42

 <https://www.uow.edu.au/molecular-horizons/index.html> Molecular Horizons Research Institute

 <https://www.ihmri.org.au/researchers/gokhan-tolun/> Illawarra Health and Medical Research Institute

University of Wollongong NSW 2522 Australia

T +61 2 4221 3365

 <http://uow.edu.au/> uow.edu.au |  <https://www.facebook.com/UOW> Facebook |  <https://twitter.com/uow> Twitter |  <https://www.instagram.com/uow/> Instagram |  <http://www.linkedin.com/edu/school?id=10255> LinkedIn 

 

NOTICE: This email is intended for the addressee named and may contain confidential information.
